2.4.4 Formål med lenke (20 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Link text is not descriptive: 'Read more'

<a class="wp-block-button__link wp-element-button" href="https://www.iearth.no">Read more</a>
Use descriptive text that indicates where the link goes (e.g., 'Read more about products' instead of 'Read more')

Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link opens in new window without indication

MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://www.eduroam.org/what-is-eduroam" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><strong>eduroam</strong> </a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

MODERATE

Link text is a URL

Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text

CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link)

<a href="https://gnistdesign.no/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="wp-image-34" decoding="async" height="15" loading="lazy" src="https://www.unis.no/wp-content/uploads/2022
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)

Duplicate ID found: '370' appears 2 times

id="370"
Each ID must be unique on the page

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="wp-block-heading">Contact:</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (21 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

<a href="https://unissvalbard.sharepoint.com/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">UNIS intranet</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (16 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers

2.4.4 Formål med lenke (23 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text is very long (222 characters)

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (1 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h1 to h4

<h4 class="wp-block-heading has-sizing-medium">Teaching and learning tools</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h2 instead of h4
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (24 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page'

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link

Recurring Issues in Article/News Pages (2 pages scanned)

[ARTICLE PAGES SUMMARY - 2 pages]
Avvik: 7 | Bestått: 0
1.1.1 Ikke-tekstlig innhold (2 avvik)
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Image is missing alt attribute (×2 across article pages)

<img src="https://www.unis.no/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/lotte-scaled-e1769518232567-922x519.jpg"/>
Add alt attribute describing the image, or alt='' if decorative
Testregel 1.1.1 (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text (×14 across article pages)

<img alt="" class="wp-image-47" data-smush-webp-fallback='{"src":"https:\/\/www.unis.no\/wp-content\/uploads\/2022\/05\/2x.png"}' decoding="async" height="24" loading="lazy" src="https://www.unis.no/w
Add descriptive alt text to the image
2.4.4 Formål med lenke (3 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MINOR

Link text has redundant phrase: 'Go to search page' (×2 across article pages)

<a aria-label="Go to search page" class="nav-search__container" href="https://www.unis.no/search/"> <i class="nav-search__icon"></i> </a>
Remove 'link to' or similar - screen readers already announce it as a link
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Link opens in new window without indication (×14 across article pages)

<a href="https://unissvalbard.sharepoint.com/" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank">UNIS intranet</a>
Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
Testregel 2.4.4 (2.4.4 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Link has no accessible name (empty link) (×16 across article pages)

<a href="https://www.facebook.com/UNIS.Svalbard" rel="noreferrer noopener" target="_blank"><img alt="" class="wp-image-47" data-smush-webp-fallback='{"src":"https:\/\/www.unis.no\/wp-content\/uploads\
Add text content, aria-label, or image with alt text
2.4.1 Hopp over blokker (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.1 (2.4.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Page has no skip link to bypass navigation (×2 across article pages)

<body>
Add a skip link at the start of the page: <a href='#main'>Hopp til hovedinnhold</a>
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container (×276 across article pages)

<a class="mm-navbar__title" href="https://www.unis.no/" rel="home">UNIS</a>

Testreglene er basert på UU-tilsynets offisielle testregler

https://unis.no
1-500

Kopier kommandoen:

python checker.py https://unis.no --max-pages 15 --format html
